title: ci: apt-get update before installing docker.io on debian-sid
body:
The conformance jobs on debian-sid have been failing intermittently with 404s when fetching docker.io, e.g.:

    E: Failed to fetch https://deb.debian.org/debian/pool/main/d/docker.io/docker.io_28.5.2+dfsg4-1_amd64.deb  404  Not Found

4-1 is not longer existing.

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
Can we bake these into the VM images?  Pulling down and installing packages at test-time is something we usually try to avoid.
@nalind  @Luap99  acked. i will build a new image. hence close this PR.
No need to build a new image, as I linked all the packages should already be in there, you just need to install them from /var/cache/download
